mapper.sql: ptc.transfer_id, ptc.internship_date, ptc.internship_by, ptc.internship_salary_date, ptc.internship_salary_by, ptc.job_prove_date, ptc.job_prove_by, ptc.go_job_date, ptc.go_job_by, ptc.salary_inform_date, ptc.salary_inform_by, ptc.failure_reazon, ptc.failure_date, ptc.failure_by, ptc.short_date, ptc.short_by, ptc.short_salary_date, ptc.short_salary_by, ptc.id, ptc.attribute2, ptc.attribute3, ptc.attribute1, ptc.create_time, ptc.create_by, ptc.update_time, ptc.update_by

${tAlias}.transfer_id as ${tAlias}_transfer_id, ${tAlias}.internship_date as ${tAlias}_internship_date, ${tAlias}.internship_by as ${tAlias}_internship_by, ${tAlias}.internship_salary_date as ${tAlias}_internship_salary_date, ${tAlias}.internship_salary_by as ${tAlias}_internship_salary_by, ${tAlias}.job_prove_date as ${tAlias}_job_prove_date, ${tAlias}.job_prove_by as ${tAlias}_job_prove_by, ${tAlias}.go_job_date as ${tAlias}_go_job_date, ${tAlias}.go_job_by as ${tAlias}_go_job_by, ${tAlias}.salary_inform_date as ${tAlias}_salary_inform_date, ${tAlias}.salary_inform_by as ${tAlias}_salary_inform_by, ${tAlias}.failure_reazon as ${tAlias}_failure_reazon, ${tAlias}.failure_date as ${tAlias}_failure_date, ${tAlias}.failure_by as ${tAlias}_failure_by, ${tAlias}.short_date as ${tAlias}_short_date, ${tAlias}.short_by as ${tAlias}_short_by, ${tAlias}.short_salary_date as ${tAlias}_short_salary_date, ${tAlias}.short_salary_by as ${tAlias}_short_salary_by, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by
mapper.insert: insert into pm_transfer_comment (transfer_id, internship_date, internship_by, internship_salary_date, internship_salary_by, job_prove_date, job_prove_by, go_job_date, go_job_by, salary_inform_date, salary_inform_by, failure_reazon, failure_date, failure_by, short_date, short_by, short_salary_date, short_salary_by, attribute2, attribute3, attribute1, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{transferId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{internshipDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{internshipBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{internshipSalaryDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{internshipSalaryBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobProveDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{jobProveBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{goJobDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{goJobBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{salaryInformDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{salaryInformBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{failureReazon,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{failureDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{failureBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shortDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{shortBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shortSalaryDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{shortSalaryBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update pm_transfer_comment set transfer_id = #{transferId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, internship_date = #{internshipDate,jdbcType=DATE}, internship_by = #{internshipBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, internship_salary_date = #{internshipSalaryDate,jdbcType=DATE}, internship_salary_by = #{internshipSalaryBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, job_prove_date = #{jobProveDate,jdbcType=DATE}, job_prove_by = #{jobProveBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, go_job_date = #{goJobDate,jdbcType=DATE}, go_job_by = #{goJobBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, salary_inform_date = #{salaryInformDate,jdbcType=DATE}, salary_inform_by = #{salaryInformBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, failure_reazon = #{failureReazon,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, failure_date = #{failureDate,jdbcType=DATE}, failure_by = #{failureBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, short_date = #{shortDate,jdbcType=DATE}, short_by = #{shortBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, short_salary_date = #{shortSalaryDate,jdbcType=DATE}, short_salary_by = #{shortSalaryBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
